settings.freeNotice: This app is free software and should not be obtained through paid access.

help.title: Gameplay Help
stats: Hunger affects the hungry state. Feed your pet when it gets too low.
Mood affects sleep quality and interaction rewards. A good mood can earn hearts.
Low cleanliness adds stress, so use cleaning actions or care items to recover it.
Energy limits play, work, and interaction. Sleep or items can restore energy.
Low health blocks Pomodoro. Use care actions or medicine before focusing.
actions: Play raises mood, but spends energy and hunger.
Clean raises cleanliness and a little health, while spending a little hunger.
Work earns coins, but spends energy and may affect mood or health.
Sleep restores energy faster and may settle sleep or dream events after waking.
other: The shop sells food, gifts, and care items. Free soda biscuits have a daily limit.
Pomodoro can run while idle or sleeping, and completed focus phases grant a small amount of mood and coins.
Frequent interaction triggers a short cooldown to prevent too much stat loss at once.

sunny.label: Sunny
sunny.summary: Good sunlight slows mood decay a little, and play gives mood +2.

cloudy.label: Cloudy
cloudy.summary: Stable weather with no extra effect.

rainy.label: Rainy
rainy.summary: Rain makes messes easier; cleaning gets +5, work earns -4 coins.

breezy.label: Breezy
breezy.summary: Fresh air restores awake energy every 4 minutes and work costs 2 less energy.

effect.sunnyPlay: The sunny day made it even happier.
